text.text:
*REPORT APP — WEEKLY PULSE*
Week of May 4–10, 2026

*Usage* — report opens as a % of hosting sessions in the week. Δ = WoW change.

• Top: Presentation Report 95.3% (+3.7%), Sessions Report 32.6% (−0.2%), Presentation Report > Participant Report 13.1% (−6.8%)
• Risers WoW: All Participant Responses Report 3.3% (+94%), All Participants Report 4.6% (+50%), Shared Presentation Report 2.8% (+24%), All Slides Report 3.5% (+13%)
• 💀 Long-term fader: Presentation Report > Feedback Tab stuck at 0.2%, down from ~4–5% before mid-April.

*CSAT* (all-time, n ≥ 10 votes)

• Top: Presentation Report > Slides 90.0%, Presentation Report > Feedback Section 85.7%, Presentation Report > Participant List 83.3%
• Bottom: Reports > Sessions 61.9%, Presentation Report > Participant Report 71.4%
• 🚨 Trending down: Presentation Report > Participant List — 92% → 83% → 84% → 77% (Jan–Apr). Sustained slide on the most-voted panel.
• Trending up: Presentation Report > Participant Report 63% → 73% → 77% (Feb–Apr).
• Verbatim on Presentation Report > Overview Section (translated from Russian): "There were 3 votes, but it only shows 1."
• Feedback themes — Presentation Report > Participant List: Excel export, response visibility, real-time updates. Presentation Report > Overview Section: vote miscounts, percentage breakdowns, downloadable data.

⚠️ ~55% of Reports CSAT events have a missing `feature_name` tag and don't appear in per-panel dashboards. Worth fixing.

<https://eu.mixpanel.com/project/2668743/view/3205947/app/boards/#id=10923568|Usage dashboard> · <https://eu.mixpanel.com/project/2668743/view/3205947/app/boards/#id=10925935|CSAT dashboard>
